thread.title: Yobe Govt State Boosts Grassroot Development With Ongoing Infrastructure Projects
thread.title_full: Yobe Govt State Boosts Grassroot Development With Ongoing Infrastructure Projects

author: Mohammed Abubakar
title: Yobe Govt State Boosts Grassroot Development With Ongoing Infrastructure Projects
text:
DAMATURU – In a bid to consolidate on the provision of infrastructure at the grassroots, the Yobe State Government has embarked on an inspection visit to supervise ongoing projects across the three senatorial districts of the state.
Led by the Commissioner for Local Government and Chieftaincy Affairs, Alhaji Ibrahim Adamu Jajere FCNA, the inspection team has so far visited the construction sites of 2km roads in Fika, Fune, Karasuwa, and Jakusko local government areas.
According to Commissioner Jajere, the inspection became necessary to ensure that the contractors handling the road projects comply with the approved standards and guidelines. He commended Governor Mai Mala Buni for investing heavily in road infrastructure across 17 local government areas.
The commissioner stated that the visit was also meant to assess the execution of the projects, ensuring adherence to contractual agreements and value for money spent. He expressed happiness with the contractors’ commitments and urged them to maintain the tempo.
The inspection team included the Permanent Secretary of the Ministry, Alhaji Umar Aji Suleiman, the Director of Administration, and other engineers.
